title: Trump threats, U.S. troop build-up raise specter of battle for Hormuz
summary_full: Israelis said securing the strait for energy shipments could become the war’s main goal now that regime change and ending Iran’s ability to obtain a nuclear weapon seem out of reach.
summary_public: Israelis said securing the strait for energy shipments could become the war’s main goal now that regime change and ending Iran’s ability to obtain a nuclear weapon seem out of reach.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: ending Iran’s ability to obtain a nuclear weapon
